docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HEBERT, ALLAN HEBERT AS TO DEFENDANT KHOSTOVAN, ALI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEBERT, ALLAN HEBERT AS TO DEFENDANT KHOSTOVAN, ALI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-07-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KHOSTOVAN, ALI
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS FILED BY HEBERT, ALLAN HEBERT KHOSTOVAN, ALI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEBERT, ALLAN HEBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHOSTOVAN, ALI $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $360.00, WHILE THE COURT DOES NOT AWARD DAMAGES FOR THE ALLEGED CONDITION OF THE FENCE, THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO EFFECTUATE APPROPRIATE REPAIRS TO SUCH WITHIN 30 DAYS OF ISSUANCE OF THIS ORDER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KHOSTOVAN, ALI
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT KHOSTOVAN, ALI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-11-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
